name: USP消音版 | 倒吊人
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been custom painted using the Hanged Man tarot card as inspiration. Past failures are the blueprints for future success
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这把武器采用了自定义涂装，使用塔罗牌中的“倒吊人”作为设计灵感。 过往的失败是成就未来的蓝图
